stories.title: Iran submits 14-point response to U.S. proposal to end war
stories.description: Iran has presented a 14-point response to the U.S. proposal to end the war, according to Iranian state media.

stories.title: Collaboration helps NPR journalists get you the story of the Iran war up close
stories.description: Three NPR journalists talk about the challenge of producing independent, accurate coverage of the war with Iran.

stories.title: ICRC President Mirjana Spoljaric warns of the war's impact on civilians
stories.description: The ICRC president talks about her recent trip to Iran, and warns about the impact of the Iran war on civilians.

stories.title: Imprisoned Iranian Nobel Peace Prize winner in critical condition
stories.description: Narges Mohammadi, an Iranian activist and 2023 Nobel Peace Prize laureate, was hospitalized after collapsing in prison. Her family says her condition has deteriorated since a March heart attack.

stories.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
stories.description: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

stories.title: British couple jailed in Iran: 'We're likely to be here for a long time'
stories.description: Lindsay and Craig Foreman are facing the reality of a 10-year prison sentence following their arrest in Iran while on a motorcycle tour last year.

stories.title: Israeli 'double-tap' strike kills three rescue workers in Lebanon, officials say
stories.description: They are among nine people killed in successive attacks on Tuesday, which Israel's military says targeted a Hezbollah commander.

stories.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
stories.description: In the two months since the deadly strike, the US defence department has said only that the incident is under investigation.

stories.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
stories.description: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

stories.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
stories.description: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.

stories.title: Couple discovers Lebanon home destroyed by Israel from satellite image
stories.description: Joe Elias contacted BBC Verify following reports that his village was among several destroyed by Israeli forces.

stories.title: What we know about the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire
stories.description: A 10-day truce between the two countries has been extended by three weeks after talks in Washington.

stories.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
stories.description: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.

stories.title: Why and how is US blockading Iranian ports in Strait of Hormuz?
stories.description: Donald Trump says that the US is blockading the Strait of Hormuz. What does this mean in practice?

stories.title: Imprisoned Iranian Nobel laureate Mohammadi rushed to hospital following cardiac 'crisis'
stories.description: Iran’s imprisoned Nobel peace prize winner Narges Mohammadi has been transferred to hospital to receive urgent care after experiencing a “catastrophic deterioration” of her health, a foundation run by her family said on Saturday. Mohammadi was moved on Friday after suffering a he...

stories.title: Pentagon announces withdrawal of 5.000 soldiers from Germany
stories.description: The US will pull around 5,000 of its troops from Germany over the next year after German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said that Tehran was "humiliating" Washington. NATO said Saturday that it is working with the US to understand the details of the decision. France 24 International A...

stories.title: Berlin urges stronger European defence
stories.description: NATO says it is working with the United States to understand the decision to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany. President Donald Trump announced the move on Friday following a dispute with Germany’s chancellor over the Iran war. Transatlantic relations have been strained since F...

stories.title: NATO in talks with US over troops cuts
stories.description: NATO on Monday said it is working with the United States to understand the decision to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany. US President Donald Trump announced the move on Friday, following a dispute with German Chancellor Friedrich Merz over the Iran war. Transatlantic relations ...

stories.title: Sudan's medicine crisis worsens
stories.description: The latest war in the Middle East is having wide-ranging consequences that extend well beyond the region, including in countries already devastated by their own conflicts. Sudan has been among the hardest hit. Aid organisations report that the Iran conflict has disrupted key ship...

stories.title: Senior Iranian officer says renewed war with US ‘likely’
stories.description: A senior Iranian officer on Saturday said that fresh fighting with the United States is “likely”, underscoring rising tensions after President Donald Trump dismissed Tehran’s latest negotiating proposal and issued fresh threats to attack the country.

stories.title: Trump 'not satisfied' with Tehran offer
stories.description: Donald Trump said Friday that he was not satisfied with Iran’s latest proposal for peace talks. Meanwhile, a senior Iranian official said renewed fighting between the United States and Iran was “likely” after Washington rejected the latest offer of negotiations. The two countries...

stories.title: US to withdraw 5.000 troops from Germany
stories.description: The US is moving ahead with Donald Trump’s plan to reduce its military presence in Germany. Late Friday, the United States Department of Defense said about 5,000 American troops-roughly 14 percent of the US service members currently stationed there—will be withdrawn from the NATO...

stories.title: Iran war live: Trump says reviewing 14-point plan; Israel pounds Lebanon
stories.description: US president says he will 'soon be reviewing the plan Iran has just sent to us', but doesn't think he can make a deal.

stories.title: Spirit Airlines collapses amid rising fuel costs from war on Iran
stories.description: US budget carrier Spirit Airlines shuts down after talks for a government bailout failed.

stories.title: Ukraine eyes Belarus border activities as Russian strikes persist
stories.description: The role of Belarus in Russia's war on Ukraine has provoked sanctions from Kyiv, which says it is ready to respond.

stories.title: Israel’s expanding ‘orange line’ tightens deadly no-go zones in Gaza
stories.description: Israel’s expanding “orange line” is deepening movement restrictions across Gaza, raising deadly risks for civilians.

stories.title: Devastation of Southern Lebanon continues under ‘ceasefire’
stories.description: At least 41 people killed as Israel launches 50 airstrikes on southern Lebanon in 24 hours.

stories.title: Prices surge, jobs disappear as war strains Iran’s economy

stories.title: Israeli air strikes on Lebanon kill 41 people in 24-hours
stories.description: Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2 increases to 2,659, 8,183 injured.

stories.title: Nato seeks details as US says it will pull about 5,000 troops from Germany
stories.description: Nato said on Saturday it was working with the United States to understand Washington’s decision to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany as a rift in transatlantic ties deepens over the Middle East war. The Pentagon’s announcement of the troop withdrawal follows a spat between US Pr...

stories.title: Ex-F1 driver turned Paralympic legend Alex Zanardi dies aged 59
stories.description: Alex Zanardi, the Italian Formula One driver who became a Paralympic champion after losing both legs in an accident, has died aged 59, his family announced on Saturday. Zanardi was one of his country’s most loved and respected sportsmen, credited with helping transform the percep...

stories.title: Dar discusses Middle East situation, its economic implications with Kuwaiti FM: FO
stories.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar on Saturday discussed the regional situation in the Middle East with Kuwait’s Foreign Minister Sheikh Jarrah Jaber Al-Ahmad Al-Sabah, the Foreign Office (FO) said. stories.title: US bypasses congressional review for military sales of $8.6 billion to Middle East allies
stories.description: United States President Donald Trump’s administration has bypassed congressional review to approve military sales totalling over $8.6 billion to Middle Eastern allies Israel, Qatar, Kuwait and the United Arab Emirates (UAE). stories.title: US ‘still not satisfied’ after Tehran conveys another offer
stories.description: • Pakistan hands over Iran’s latest proposal to US, refuses to divulge contents• Trump says Iran ‘made strides’ in talks, claims process marred by ‘tremendous discord’; appreciates PM Shehbaz, FM Munir’s role• Diplomats describe transmission of proposals as a positive step, despi...

stories.title: Bomb blast kills religious figure in Damascus
stories.description: DAMASCUS: A Shia cleric who served at Syria’s revered Sayyida Zeinab shrine in Damascus’s southern suburbs was killed in a bomb blast on Friday, state media reported. “Farhan Hassan al Mansour was killed in a bomb blast... in the Sayyida Zeinab area,” state television reported. “...

stories.title: Trump says U.S. could restart Iran strikes ‘if they misbehave’
stories.description: When asked about Iran’s proposal, Mr. Trump replied: “They told me about the concept of the ‌deal. They’re going to give me the exact wording now”

stories.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Iran military official says renewed war with U.S. 'likely'
stories.description: The United States is warning shipping companies that they could face sanctions for making payments to Iran to safely pass through the Strait of Hormuz; Donald Trump said on May 1, that he was "not satisfied" with a new Iranian negotiating proposal

stories.title: China rejects U.S. sanctions on refineries over Iran oil links
stories.description: The U.S. sanctions "improperly prohibit or restrict Chinese enterprises from conducting normal economic, trade and related activities with third countries... and violate international law and the basic norms governing international relations," the Commerce Ministry said in a stat...

stories.title: Israeli airstrikes on southern Lebanon kill seven amid fragile ceasefire
stories.description: Lebanon's state-run National News Agency reported an airstrike on a car in the village of Kfar Dajal that killed two people, while another hit a home in the village of Lwaizeh killing three.

stories.title: Trump jokes U.S. Navy will take on Cuba on the way home from Iran
stories.description: The Trump administration is in the midst of a monthslong campaign to press the Cuban government to make dramatic reforms

stories.title: NATO says ‘working’ with U.S. to ‘understand' decision to cut troops in Germany
stories.description: The U.S. move came after President Donald Trump renewed criticism of German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, who said that Iran was "humiliating" Washington in negotiations to end the war in the West Asia
